headline: Robinhood, Webull & Others Poised to Gain From SEC Move on Day Trading
summary: SEC backs scrapping "pattern day trader" label, swapping the $25k rule for intraday margin, boosting HOOD, BULL and other retail brokerages.

raw.headline: Robinhood, Webull & Others Poised to Gain From SEC Move on Day Trading
raw.summary: SEC backs scrapping "pattern day trader" label, swapping the $25k rule for intraday margin, boosting HOOD, BULL and other retail brokerages.

headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Coinbase Global (COIN) After Recent Crypto Buzz?
summary: Wondering whether Coinbase Global's current share price still makes sense after the recent crypto buzz, or if expectations have already gone too far? This article focuses squarely on what you are paying versus what you may be getting. With the stock at US$195.90, recent returns have been mixed, including a 11.9% gain over the past week, a 3.6% decline over the last 30 days, a 17.2% decline year to date, a 13.8% return over 1 year, a very large 3 year return of about 3x, and a 37.2% decline...

headline: Why Is Coinbase (COIN) Stock Soaring Today
summary: Shares of blockchain infrastructure company Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) jumped 5.3% in the afternoon session after the technology sector rallied, pushing the Nasdaq near all-time highs, as investors cheered a potential de-escalation of geopolitical tensions in the Middle East amid a flurry of positive news in the artificial intelligence space.

raw.headline: Why Is Coinbase (COIN) Stock Soaring Today
